candidate_definition_hints.text: an implementation of softmax splatting for differentiable forward warping using PyTorch

This is a reference implementation of the softmax splatting operator, which has been proposed in Softmax Splatting for Video Frame Interpolation [1], using PyTorch. Softmax splatting is a well-motivated approach for differentiable forward warping. It uses a translational invaria…
